steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject is “the Museum of Modern Art's vast collection of oil paintings”—a singular noun phrase. Though a relative clause interrupts with multiple artworks, the head noun “collection” is singular.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Subject-verb agreement requires the verb to match the singular subject. Remains is singular and agrees correctly with “collection.” The other three options—remain, have been remaining, and have remained—are all plural forms that violate this agreement.

That is the correct answer.
